title: What API Endpoint to use for finding items by column value

posts.author: Fahad (Fahad)
posts.cookedHtml:
I basically wanna create an API request to find an item based on a column value (email).

Out of all the API docs I used, this one confuses me.

It doesn’t show what end-point to use, what all query parameters are required and how it should be inputted to find the right one.

I might be wrong here, this is different to the API doc format am familiar with so am stuck, could anyone assist me.

PS: I am using Zapier for this

image911×1134 75.6 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @Fahad and welcome to the community!

It looks like you are using Zapier’s out-of-the-box block (the action to get items by column values). But it looks like it is some kind of “copy”.

What happens if you use the regular one? I am testing this and it does not require much configuration (the original “Get Item by Column Value” block):

image412×569 19.7 KB
